findings.title: Use after free via dangling pointer after document removal
findings.description: Document pointer dereferenced after store.remove deletes the object and frees its content

findings.title: Use after free via EventBus holding stale document pointers
findings.description: EventBus retains raw pointers to documents freed by store.remove, dereferenced during publish

findings.title: Use after free via shallow content copy in fetch_and_release
findings.description: Snapshot shallow-copies content pointer that is freed when store.remove deletes the original document

findings.title: Double free of document content buffer
findings.description: Content pointer freed by store.remove then freed again explicitly causing heap corruption

findings.title: Use after free via stale buffer in build_index after realloc
findings.description: Old buffer pointer dereferenced after resize_buffer frees it on the realloc failure path
